title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: The talk argues that humans remain better than AI at reliably editing complex documents like Word files. The core challenge for AI is that documents contain hidden structural logic and dependencies that must be preserved, making document editing more akin to programming than text manipulation. Scaling document editing to thousands of files requires treating them as software systems rather than simple files.
